Empty Slot.NAME: Empty Slot
Empty Slot.DESCRIPTION: Empty Slot that can be filled with an Item

Bag of Tiles.NAME: Bag of Tiles
Bag of Tiles.DESCRIPTION: [b]Choose one of three Tiles[/b] to add in the [i]Top 5 Positions[/i] of your [b]Deck[/b]

Architect's Hammer.NAME: Architect's Hammer
Architect's Hammer.DESCRIPTION: Add one [b]Slot[/b] in the [b]Shop[/b] or in the [b]Item Bar[/b].

Touch of Midas.NAME: Touch of Midas
Touch of Midas.DESCRIPTION: [b]Rarify[/b] a [b]non-Gold Board Tile[/b] up to [b]Gold[/b], [b]Remove[/b] all [b]Effects[/b] from it.[br][font_size=10][color=Gray](If the [b]Chosen Tile[/b] has [b]Rainbow Effect[/b], it gains a random [i]color[/i])[/color][/font_size]

Burning Shoes.NAME: Burning Shoes
Burning Shoes.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you [b]Draw Tiles[/b], [b]Draw[/b] [i]an additional[/i] [b]Tile[/b], then [i]increase this by 1[/i] for this [b]Round[/b]
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: additional [/i] [b]Tiles[/b], then [i]increase this by 1[/i] for this [b]Round[/b]

Monkey's Paw.NAME: Monkey's Paw
Monkey's Paw.DESCRIPTION: Select a [b]Tile[/b] to [b]de-Rarify[/b], then [b]Choose one of three Tiles[/b], with [i]the same [b]Rarity[/b] and [b]Effects[/b][/i] as the [b]Selected Tile[/b], to [b]Replace the Selected Tile[/b].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]Can only be [b]Used[/b] 3 times per [b]Round[/b][/color][/font_size]

Bottled Nostalgia.NAME: Bottled Nostalgia
Bottled Nostalgia.DESCRIPTION: On your next [b]Round End[/b], the [b]Tiles[/b] you would [b]Discard[/b] are [i]instead [b]Added[/b] back into your [b]Deck[/b][/i].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]Won't count as [b]Discarded Tiles[/b][/color][/font_size]
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: [b]Round Ends[/b], the [b]Tiles[/b] you would [b]Discard[/b] are [i]instead [b]Added[/b] back into your [b]Deck[/b][/i].[br][font_size=10][color=gray]Won't count as [b]Discarded Tiles[/b][/color][/font_size]

Architect's Chisel.NAME: Architect's Chisel
Architect's Chisel.DESCRIPTION: The next non-[b]Joker[/b], non-[b]Gold[/b] [b]Tile[/b] you [b]Add[/b] into your [b]Deck[/b] is [b]Rarified[/b]
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: non-[b]Joker[/b], non-[b]Gold[/b] [b]Tiles[/b] you [b]Add[/b] into your [b]Deck[/b] are [b]Rarified[/b]
